moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are in their second week, with quarter-finals underway, leading to the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals this weekend.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Centre Court is buzzing! It's the business end of Wimbledon. Who are you backing for the semi-finals?

angles.name: UK Hopefuls
angles.copy: Any British players still flying the flag at Wimbledon? We're on the edge of our seats as the tournament heats up!

angles.name: Beyond the Courts
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream, queueing, and incredible tennis – it can only be Wimbledon! Who's soaking up the atmosphere?

moments.title: Tour de France Stage 5
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France continues today with Stage 5, a flat 158.3km ride from Lannemezan to Pau, as the peloton makes its way through the Pyrenees.

angles.name: Mountain Challenges
angles.copy: The Tour de France is well underway! Today's stage takes riders through some stunning landscapes. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: Stage 5 of the Tour de France is LIVE! Tune in to see who breaks away in the flat section before the mountains loom.

moments.title: England's World Cup Injury
moments.blurb: England midfielder Jordan Henderson has been ruled out of the remainder of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after sustaining a serious arm injury post-match against Mexico.

angles.name: Henderson Out
angles.copy: Big blow for England! Jordan Henderson is out of the World Cup with a freak injury. Wishing him a speedy recovery.

angles.name: Who Steps Up?
angles.copy: With Henderson sidelined, who do you think steps up for England in the World Cup midfield? Massive shoes to fill!

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13
moments.blurb: Love Island UK's 13th season is in full swing on ITV2 and ITVX, with new islanders entering the Mallorca villa and the drama heating up, alongside a World Cup crossover theme.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: It's another night in the Love Island villa! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's heading for a bombshell dumping?

angles.name: World Cup Crossover
angles.copy: Love Island meets the World Cup this summer! Are you here for the football-themed villa drama? 👀

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning genre-bending musician Beck David Hansen celebrates his 56th birthday today, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At'.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Beck
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your all-time favourite track from his incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Beck's Best
angles.copy: From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', Beck has always pushed boundaries. Celebrating his 56th today – what's the Beck song that takes you back?

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28
moments.blurb: American actor and hip-hop artist Jaden Smith, known for his unique style and music, celebrates his 28th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jaden
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 28th birthday to Jaden Smith! What's your favourite track or movie role from him?

moments.title: Joan Osborne Turns 64
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Joan Osborne, famous for her 1995 hit 'One of Us', celebrates her 64th birthday today.

angles.name: One of Us
angles.copy: Happy 64th birthday to the incredible Joan Osborne! 'One of Us' is still a timeless classic. What memories does that song bring back for you?

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a celebration of rock and alternative music, begins today in Gloucestershire and runs until July 11th.

angles.name: Trees is ON!
angles.copy: It's here! 2000trees Festival kicks off today in Gloucestershire. Who's heading down for a weekend of incredible rock and alternative acts?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The fields of Gloucestershire are alive with the sound of music! Wishing everyone at 2000trees a fantastic festival!

moments.title: Perrie Edwards Turns 33
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards, known for her powerful vocals and pop hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Perrie
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Perrie Edwards turns 33 on Friday. What's your favourite Little Mix track?

angles.name: Little Mix Star
angles.copy: Powerhouse vocalist Perrie Edwards has a birthday coming up! Show some love for the Little Mix star turning 33 this week.

moments.title: Neil Tennant Turns 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist and keyboardist of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boy
angles.copy: Happy 72nd birthday to the legendary Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys on Friday! What's their ultimate synth-pop anthem for you?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Neil Tennant's 72nd this week! From 'West End Girls' to 'Go West', Pet Shop Boys defined an era. Which track is your favourite?

moments.title: Jason Orange Turns 56
moments.blurb: Former Take That member Jason Orange, a key part of the iconic boy band, celebrates his 56th birthday on Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Take That Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to Take That's Jason Orange on Friday! What's your favourite Take That memory?

angles.name: Jason's Day
angles.copy: It's nearly Jason Orange's birthday! Celebrating the Take That star turning 56 this week. What's your top Take That tune?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park in London on Saturday, July 11th, promising a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Festival
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park this Saturday. Who's heading there for the music and views?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Getting ready for Kaleidoscope on Saturday! A brilliant blend of music and comedy in one of London's best spots.

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings its unique electronic and dance music experience to Newcastle on Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Newcastle Calling
angles.copy: Newcastle, get ready! Lost Minds Festival is this Saturday, bringing huge dance acts to the city. Who's buzzing for it?

angles.name: Dance Festival
angles.copy: Hands in the air for Lost Minds Festival this weekend! Expect big beats and massive vibes in Newcastle.

moments.title: Boogietown Festival
moments.blurb: Boogietown Festival hits London on Saturday, July 11th, offering a day of disco, funk, and soul in the capital.

angles.name: Boogie to Boogietown
angles.copy: London, are you ready to boogie? Boogietown Festival is this Saturday, bringing the best in disco, funk, and soul!

angles.name: Funk & Soul Vibes
angles.copy: Get your dancing shoes on! Boogietown Festival is set to bring the good times to London this weekend. What's your favourite funk anthem?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, starts its tournament play on Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: The Open Championship is just a week away! The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale. Who are you tipping for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Practice days start Sunday, then it's tee time for The Open on Thursday! Get ready for some incredible golf from Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating traditional and contemporary Scottish music, takes place from July 15th-18th in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Celtic Vibes
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next week. Who's excited for some amazing Scottish music?

angles.name: Festival Scotland
angles.copy: Next week, Stornoway lights up for the Hebridean Celtic Festival! A true highlight of the Scottish summer.

moments.title: Luke Bryan Turns 49
moments.blurb: Award-winning American country music superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 49th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 49th birthday to country sensation Luke Bryan on July 17th! What's your favourite of his hits?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher Turns 41
moments.blurb: McFly frontman, author, and musician Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Tom
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 41st birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher on July 17th! What's your favourite McFly song?

moments.title: Jason Aalon Butler Turns 40
moments.blurb: Fever 333 and letlive. vocalist Jason Aalon Butler, known for his energetic performances and powerful lyrics, celebrates his 40th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 40th birthday to the incredible Jason Aalon Butler (Fever 333, letlive.) on July 17th! What's your favourite track from him?

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton Turns 44
moments.blurb: Atomic Kitten singer Natasha Hamilton, a popular figure from the 00s pop scene, celebrates her 44th birthday on Thursday, July 17th.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 44th birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton on July 17th! What's your favourite Atomic Kitten hit?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: For many schools across the UK, especially in Northern Ireland and parts of England, the summer holidays are now officially underway.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: School's officially out for summer for many across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: That holiday feeling! If your kids broke up for summer this week, what's first on your to-do list?
